title: UX/UI Designer
description: Lead end-to-end design strategy across SCIP's global platform—from wireframes and user flows to polished, production-ready interfaces. Collaborate with engineering, content, and product teams to deliver accessible, user-centered digital experiences.
requirements: 1+ year(s) of UI/UX design experience in a corporate, industry, or nonprofit setting.
Proficiency in Figma or equivalent (AI design tool experience is a bonus).
Portfolio of professional design work required.
benefits: High-visibility role in a global digital transformation project
Opportunity to mentor and upskill internal team members
Remote-friendly and highly collaborative team environment

title: UX/UI Designer (HR-Focused)
description: Design intuitive user experiences for SCIP's Job Portal and Talent Pipeline, including candidate-facing and internal dashboard interfaces. Map and improve HR and compliance workflows to translate complex processes into clear, accessible user journeys.
requirements: 1+ year(s) of UI/UX design experience with exposure to HR platforms, compliance workflows, talent systems, or equivalent enterprise environments.
Background or professional experience in HR, people operations, or compliance is strongly preferred.
Portfolio demonstrating relevant HR, compliance, or enterprise UX work is required.
benefits: High-visibility role in a global digital transformation project
Opportunity to shape talent pipeline and onboarding experiences for a global nonprofit
Remote-friendly and highly collaborative team environment

title: Content & SEO Specialist
description: Develop and execute an integrated content and SEO strategy aligned with SCIP's global mission and audience needs. Produce and optimize content for web, landing pages, blogs, and digital campaigns with a focus on organic visibility.
requirements: 1+ year(s) of combined or individual experience in content strategy and SEO in a corporate, agency, or nonprofit environment.
Proficiency in SEMrush, Ahrefs, or equivalent SEO tools required.
A portfolio of professional writing samples with demonstrated impact is required.
benefits: High-visibility role driving organic growth and brand awareness
Opportunity to build content standards and upskill internal teams
Remote-friendly and flexible scheduling

title: Frontend Developer
description: Architect and build scalable, performant frontend solutions using Next.js 15+ (App Router), TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Develop reusable component libraries and design systems that ensure consistency across the platform.
requirements: 1+ year(s) of frontend development experience with a focus on React and Next.js (App Router experience required).
Proficiency in TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and modern state management tools.
GitHub portfolio or project demo showcasing significant Next.js/React work required.
benefits: Architect and lead code decisions on Next.js 15+ environments
High-visibility role in a global digital transformation project
Hands-on experience with headless CMS (Strapi) and e-commerce platforms

title: Mobile Developer
description: Architect and build a high-performance, cross-platform mobile application using React Native with TypeScript, targeting both iOS and Android devices to extend our talent acquisition and e-commerce platforms.
requirements: 1+ year(s) of professional mobile development experience with React Native.
Proficiency in TypeScript with working knowledge of Swift (iOS) and Kotlin (Android) for native module development.
GitHub portfolio or published app store links demonstrating production-grade mobile work required.
benefits: Own the mobile architecture and full deployment lifecycle (App Store & Google Play)
High-visibility role with direct, global user-facing impact
Remote-friendly environment

title: Financial Analyst Intern
description: Support the Finance team in budget forecasting, cost-allocation analysis, and financial reporting for SCIP's global programs. Gain hands-on experience structuring financial models for non-profit operations.
requirements: Currently pursuing or recently completed a degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or Business Administration.
Strong proficiency in Microsoft Excel (VLOOKUPs, Pivot Tables) and financial modeling basics.
Excellent analytical skills and attention to detail.
benefits: Hands-on experience in non-profit corporate finance and budgeting structures
Mentorship from experienced senior financial professionals
Flexible hybrid hours tailored to class schedules

title: Corporate Partnership Coordinator
description: Assist with managing investor relationships, tracking grant application pipelines, and drafting financial proposals to secure corporate sponsorship funding for our digital transformation initiatives.
requirements: Experience or strong interest in non-profit fundraising, investor relations, or corporate sales.
Strong written and verbal communication skills for presenting financial narratives.
Familiarity with CRM tools (like Salesforce or HubSpot) is a plus.
benefits: Opportunity to build a high-value professional network with corporate sponsors
Hands-on experience in business development and grant management
Remote-friendly with localized networking opportunities in Toronto

title: Digital Marketing Coordinator
description: Coordinate multi-channel email marketing newsletters, monitor campaign analytics, and design promotional strategies to raise awareness of SCIP's mentorship and professional development programs across EMEA regions.
requirements: Experience with email marketing platforms (Mailchimp, HubSpot, or equivalent).
Basic understanding of digital marketing KPIs (Open rates, CTR, conversion tracking).
Strong copywriting skills with a global, inclusive tone.
benefits: Ownership over regional marketing strategies in Europe
Real-world experience managing enterprise-grade marketing automation systems
Flexible part-time hours perfect for career-switchers or professionals giving back

title: Social Media Lead
description: Lead SCIP's organic social media presence across LinkedIn, Instagram, and TikTok. Define regional content calendars, coordinate asset creation, and monitor engagement metrics to drive candidate recruitment and mentor sign-ups.
requirements: Proven experience growing organic communities on LinkedIn, TikTok, or Instagram.
Ability to create visually engaging short-form video content and graphics (Canva/CapCut proficiency).
Strong communication and collaborative leadership skills.
benefits: Direct ownership of SCIP's public-facing brand voice in Asia-Pacific markets
Build a portfolio highlighting community building and viral reach statistics
Collaborative creative autonomy within a supportive global environment

title: Social Media Content Creation Intern
description: Collaborate with our design and global marketing teams to create visually striking, localized graphics, student highlight reels, and copy that showcase SCIP's STEM and business success stories to a global student audience.
requirements: Strong design eye with basic graphic design and video editing experience.
High familiarity with trends on Instagram, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn.
Bilingual (English and Japanese) is a plus but not required.
benefits: Mentorship from senior creative directors and marketing strategists
Flexible program designed to fit alongside university commitments
Work on high-impact visual campaigns that bridge global diverse talent with top companies
